PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('function')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('type')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('attr')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('private')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetImportStatementImpl(IMPORT_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IMPORT)('import')
    PsiErrorElement:DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING, SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING or STRING expected, got 'application'
      <empty list>
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('application')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('consumes')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('produces')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('site')
